title: Woodland management plan (PA3) 2024
body: " The Woodland management plan (PA3) 2024 guidance consists of:   applicant’s guide agreement holder’s guide terms and conditions   Read the agreement holder’s guide to find out how to manage your agreement.  Read how to make a claim for payment.  Contact Rural Payments Agency  You can contact RPA by email, phone or post.  Quote your single business identifier (SBI) and agreement number for all enquiries.   Rural Payments Agency  PO Box 324 Worksop S95 1DF  Email: ruralpayments@defra.gov.uk  Telephone: 03000 200 301 Monday to Friday, 8:30am to 5pm, except bank holidays Find out about call charges   "
